architecture: - Continuous monitoring and optimization were agreed upon as essential for effective feature storage and retrieval. Planning for schema designs that align with ML model needs was emphasized.
other: - The group agreed on implementing strategies to handle variable latencies from external APIs, safeguarding the integrity and performance of ML models in dynamic market conditions.

- For data sources involving user input (like social media), implement consent management systems ensuring users have agreed to data collection and processing. Maintain transparency with user notifications about data usage and privacy policies.
